thesis: Hedging regime dead. Commodity rotation started. Two nodes confirmed.

captions.text: Two nodes flipped in one week.
Most people track price. This tracks where $46 billion moved.
Bonds: confirmed. Four weeks of buying. Then full stop.
Currencies: repricing. JPY down 58% in a week.
Commodities: emerging. AUD held while everything collapsed.
Crypto: confirmed at 93. Chart hasn't caught up yet.
That's not five random markets. That's one chain. And it just shifted.
Like and subscribe. Full read in link in bio.

voiceover.text: Two nodes flipped. In one week.
Most people track price. This tracks where 46 billion dollars in institutional capital actually moved.

Bonds. Confirmed. Four weeks of buying, then full stop. Currencies. Repricing. Yen down 58% in a week. Commodities. Emerging. Australian dollar held while everything around it collapsed. Equities. Stalled. 334 thousand contracts short. Crypto. Confirmed at 93. Chart hasn't caught up yet.
That's not five random markets. That's one chain. And it just shifted.
Like and subscribe. Full read in the link in bio.
